ingestion_strategy.source_of_truth: Caltrans Labor Surcharge & Equipment Rental Rate Book accessible CSV
ingestion_strategy.notes: Use accessible CSV as canonical v0 import. Miscellaneous equipment rates remain a secondary optional source path.

normalize_steps: Load book header into equipment_rate_book with effective window and source metadata.
Load each row into equipment_rate_entry preserving code, description, rate basis, and raw source payload.
Mark Caltrans book rows as public_works_canonical = true.
Keep miscellaneous rates separate until mapped by operator to avoid contaminating the standard book.
